subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-07-24
subcodes.first_line: In the world of existence there is nothing so important as spirit, nothing so essential as the spirit of man
subcodes.subjects: @proofs for the existence; immortality of the soul, @man's distinction from the animal, @relationship of the soul to the body, @power of the mind over nature, @meaning; importance of dreams and visions
